prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: full-screen nationwide overview map plate for an interactive railway operations ASMR simulator
Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art overview map of the whole Japanese archipelago for a railway operations simulator, clearly showing Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu, major bays and coastlines, mountains, forests, and major city clusters.
Scene/backdrop: recognizable full Japan map from northeast to southwest, deep ocean, islands, green mountains, city clusters at Tokyo/Yokohama, Nagoya, Kyoto/Osaka, Hiroshima, Hakata/Fukuoka, Sendai, Sapporo, Kagoshima. Include thin rail-corridor hints but keep the map readable as Japan.
Subject: nationwide environment and city nodes only, an empty interactive board for train routes and labels.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art / late-1990s Japanese transport management sim, dense miniature details at nationwide scale, polished game background.
Composition/framing: wide 16:10 landscape, entire Japan fits in frame, Honshu spans center, Tokyo area toward lower-right/center-right, Kansai/Nagoya central-left, Kyushu lower-left, Hokkaido upper-right. Leave edges usable for HUD overlays.
Lighting/mood: calm sunny morning, ASMR railway atlas, quiet and detailed.
Color palette: rich ocean blue, lush forest green, muted city gray, warm station/city lights.
Critical constraints: no UI panels, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark, no giant train, no foreground train, no checkerboard.
